limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or infrastructure commitments found in excerpts; named initiative (AI training build-out) and general technology investment references support score 3 only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: 'AI everywhere for everyone' and training build-out are named initiatives but no deployment status, production metrics, or quantified outcomes are disclosed in these excerpts; score 3 reflects named initiative without deployment detail.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present (forward-looking/risk excerpt); AI risk is named but described generically ('risks and challenges') without specific mechanisms linking to revenue/operations/compliance impact, supporting score 3 over 4.
Excerpts are limited and may not capture full AI disclosure in the filing; capex and detailed use-case sections may exist elsewhere in the document.
